item.title: MAGA Mother FAFO
item.description:
This woman depicts the epitome of the problem. Another white woman who didn't pay attention to anything anybody else has been saying for almost a decade now. Just like many of the red hats, they do not pay attention to consequences of action until it happens to them.
Any person that thinks newborn babies were being slaughtered after birth because of politicized bullshit from Fox News and Donald Trump himself. Frankly, I do not feel bad for theze individual, but feel bad for these situations that are numerous. It is not a hard concept that women should have 100% body autonomy and control over themselves. Ladies, I am sorry this is the world we live in. Does anybody else have somebody in their life like this? Have you had to suffer because of the legislation passed by the Red Hat? Let us know in the comments down below. (This is a satire post, recounting real conversations and situations) https://www.propublica.org/article/texas-abortion-ban-exceptions-deaths
item.dc:creator: SquaresNews

item.title: Nobel Peace Prize 2025: Maria Corina Machado
item.description:
https://theguardian.com/world/live/2025/oct/10/nobel-peace-prize-2025-live-latest-news-updates
https://nobelprize.org/prizes/peace/2025/summary > The Nobel Peace Prize 2025 was awarded to Maria Corina Machado "for her tireless work promoting democratic rights for the people of Venezuela and for her struggle to achieve a just and peaceful transition from dictatorship to democracy." tldr: Maria Corina Machado won the 2025 Nobel Peace Prize for her fight against the dictatorship in Venezuela. She co-founded Súmate to monitor elections, served in the National Assembly, and united the opposition despite repression by the authoritarian regime. Wonder who will win the 2030 Nobel Peace Prize for fighting dictatorship in the US?
item.dc:creator: RummageSaleBubbler

item.title: 2025 Nobel Peace Prize Winner
item.description: https://www.cnn.com/world/live-news/nobel-peace-prize-10-10-25 https://www.bbc.com/news/live/c1l80g1qe4gt EDIT: Wow, most viral! Thanks! In the immortal words of Bill & Ted: “Be excellent to each other.” Thanks so much for the accolade!

item.title: Baallllll!
item.description: EDIT: Friday Frontpage again! Thanks a lot Imgurians! I do some reviews as a hobby, this week was the (in)famous Cyberpunk 2077, if you wanna see it, check https://youtu.be/W7V1fkTe4dw or if you're in a reading mood, https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1490 (fridge cigarette)
item.description:
Let's get this loaf of beer.
Turns out some common weeds in the US were originally plants domesticated by the indigenous peoples here! Neat, eh?
Turns out theres a lot of racist common names in botany and mycology....
I've heard it argued that the real last Western Roman emperor was Theoderic the Great. And you know what? It kinda makes sense. He did more for Italy than Julius Nepos and Romulus Augustulatus did....
The bird omens were unclear: but nice. The last migrant Warblers of fall are passing through, and i saw a female Townsend's Warbler and an Orange-crowned Warbler flitting through the oaks and ash trees that are just barely starting to turn.
I had a dream about a woman who looked very similar to this once, long ago, down to similar tattoos. She was a very, very old Goddess of the landscape where I live. Her earrings were made of mammoth ivory, and she had a pin in her long hair that was a living brachiopod from the ancient sea that once covered here.
I think these are Kievan Rus soldiers? I cant remember the context of where I saved this, sorry.
Kinda like the Catholic and Orthodox Churches.
Pippin tax. Today's message from Pippin: "What the fuck?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Trump and White House used footage from Florida to show ‘chaos’ in Chicago, report claims The footage shows palm trees in the background, which are not commonly found in Chicago
item.description: https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/us-politics/trump-white-house-florida-footage-chicago-b2842775.html
item.dc:creator: d14z3p4m

item.title: He's the definite article.
item.description: He's the end boss of kiddie diddling. I don't even have to say his name, and everyone knows who I mean. And not just here on Imgur. Even in the most right wing of circles, as soon as I refer to some generalized person in power as "The Pedophile", they immediately get defensive because they know who I'm talking about. I strongly encourage you to do the same.
item.dc:creator: TheSecondPiewackit

item.title: This makes me very happy.
item.description: María Corina Machado has been announced as the winner of the Nobel Peace Prize 2025 for promoting democratic rights for the people of Venezuela. She is Venezuela’s main opposition leader.
